transcript: Speaker A (Human): काय करतेस? [What are you doing?] I sleeping. Speaker B (AI): "I am sleeping" असं म्हणायचं. आणि थोडं formal म्हणायचं असेल तर "I am getting some sleep" असंही म्हणू शकतेस. [Say "I am sleeping". And if you want to say it a bit formally, you can also say "I am getting some sleep".] Speaker A (Human): अरे हो, पण English कसं शिकायचं? [Oh yes, but how to learn English?] Speaker B (AI): माझ्यासोबत दररोज फक्त १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस केलीस तर फक्त एका महिन्यात तू confidently English बोलू शकतेस. [If you practice with me for just 15 minutes every day, you can speak English confidently in just one month.] Speaker A (Human): पण ते महाग असेल ना? [But that must be expensive, right?] Speaker B (AI): अजिबात नाही! फक्त १ रुपयात तू हा ॲप पूर्ण ट्राय करून पाहू शकतेस. १०० लाखांपेक्षा जास्त लोग माझ्यासोबत English शिकत आहेत. [Not at all! You can try this app fully for just 1 rupee. More than 10 million people are learning English with me.] Speaker A (Human): वाव! कसं जॉईन करू? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker B (AI): आत्ताच MySivi ॲप डाऊनलोड कर आणि English शिकायला सुरुवात कर. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text: काय करतेस [What are you doing?] | I sleeping | "I am sleeping" | आणि थोडं formal म्हणायचं असेल तर "I am getting some sleep" असंही म्हणू शकतेस [And if you want to say it a bit formally, you can also say "I am getting some sleep"] | MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, ₹1 | Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads
summary: A split-screen ad where an AI avatar corrects a human's English grammar while lying in bed. The AI explains that users can practice for 15 minutes daily to speak confidently within a month. It promotes a 1-rupee trial offer for the MySivi app, urging viewers to download it.
